Appointment.title: Aircon Appointment
Appointment.description: Represents a local aircon servicing appointment booked by a Penang resident.

userId.description: UID of the user who booked the appointment or a consistent guest ID.

clientPhone.description: Contact number of the client in Malaysia / Penang (e.g., +601x-xxxxxxx).

clientAddress.description: Full home/office layout address in Penang.

clientArea.description: The specific area in Penang (Island or Mainland) where the service takes place.

serviceType.description: The type of aircon service requested by the user.

unitsCount.description: The number of aircon units requiring service.

acType.description: The style of the aircon unit.

acBrand.description: The brand of the air conditioning unit (e.g., Daikin, Panasonic, Mitsubishi, York).

serviceDate.description: The requested date for the servicing appointment.

serviceTimeSlot.description: Preferred time range slot (Morning 9am-12pm, Afternoon 1pm-4pm, Late Afternoon 4pm-7pm).

userNotes.description: Additional requirements or issue notes from the user.

estimatePrice.description: The calculated cost estimate in RM (Ringgit Malaysia).

status.description: Current workflow status of the servicing appointment.

technicianName.description: Name of the assigned local aircon technician, if any.

photoBefore.description: Base64 encoded string of user's aircon unit before servicing is performed.

photoAfter.description: Base64 encoded string of user's aircon unit after servicing is completed.

rating.description: User feedback rating from 1 to 5 stars.

review.description: Written review or customer comments left after completion.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the appointment was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the appointment was last modified.

/appointments/{appointmentId}.description: Collection of aircon servicing appointment requests in Penang.
